parameters.query:
UPDATE calls
SET
  incident_state = jsonb_set(COALESCE(incident_state, '{}'::jsonb), '{incident_category}', to_jsonb($2::text), true),
  status = 'SUCCESS'
WHERE call_id = $1;
SELECT id, full_name, calendar_id, specialty FROM technicians WHERE status = 'available' LIMIT 2;

UPDATE calls
SET
  gcal_event_id = $2,
  technician_id = $3,
  status = 'COMPLETED'
WHERE call_id = $1;
SELECT id, calendar_id FROM technicians WHERE full_name = $1;

UPDATE calls
SET
  status = $2,
  error_log = $3::jsonb
WHERE call_id = $1;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.call_id, $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.error_status, JSON.stringify({ message: $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.error_message, node: $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.error_node, detail: $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.error_detail })] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO workflow_logs (call_id, tool_name, node_name, level, status, payload)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'ERROR', $4, $5::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [($('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.call_id === 'unknown' ? null : $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.call_id), $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.tool_name, $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.error_node, $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.error_status, JSON.stringify({ message: $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.error_message, detail: $('Error Logger Funnel').first().json.error_detail })] }}

parameters.query:
WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO appointment_slots (technician_id, slot_start, call_id)
  VALUES ($1, $2::timestamptz, $3)
  ON CONFLICT (technician_id, slot_start) DO NOTHING
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ins) AS reserved;

DELETE FROM appointment_slots
WHERE technician_id = $1 AND slot_start = $2::timestamptz AND gcal_event_id IS NULL;

DELETE FROM appointment_slots
WHERE technician_id = $1 AND slot_start = $2::timestamptz AND gcal_event_id IS NULL;

DELETE FROM appointment_slots
WHERE technician_id = $1 AND slot_start = $2::timestamptz AND gcal_event_id IS NULL;

assignments.name: error_message
assignments.value: Fallo al reservar el slot en la base de datos (candado anti doble-reserva)

parameters.query:
SELECT c.gcal_event_id, t.full_name AS technician_name, a.slot_start
FROM calls c
LEFT JOIN technicians t ON t.id = c.technician_id
LEFT JOIN appointment_slots a ON a.gcal_event_id = c.gcal_event_id
WHERE c.phone_number = $1
  AND c.status = 'COMPLETED'
  AND c.gcal_event_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.call_id, c.gcal_event_id, c.technician_id, t.calendar_id
FROM calls c
LEFT JOIN technicians t ON t.id = c.technician_id
WHERE c.phone_number = $1
  AND c.status = 'COMPLETED'
  AND c.gcal_event_id IS NOT NULL
  AND c.call_id <> $2
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

DELETE FROM appointment_slots WHERE gcal_event_id = $1;
UPDATE calls SET status = 'CANCELLED' WHERE gcal_event_id = $1;

assignments.name: error_message
assignments.value: Fallo al cancelar la cita (Google Calendar o base de datos)

parameters.content:
# [05] CITAS EXISTENTES (RE-LLAMADAS, CANCELAR, REPROGRAMAR)
## Identifica al cliente por su numero entrante. `lookup` devuelve su cita activa (para reconocerlo). `cancel` borra el evento de Google Calendar, libera el slot y marca la llamada como CANCELLED. La busqueda de cancelacion excluye la cita creada en la llamada actual, de modo que 'reprogramar' = el agente agenda la nueva (book) y luego cancela la anterior (cancel) sin riesgo de quedarse sin cita.

# [01] RECEPCIÓN Y ENRUTAMIENTO

## Captura el webhook de Vapi, inicializa el registro de la llamada en Supabase con estado IN_PROGRESS y deriva el flujo según la intención del usuario (Soporte Técnico o Agenda).

# [02] CONSULTAS TÉCNICAS (RAG)
## Genera embeddings con Gemini para consultar la base de conocimientos vectorial. Devuelve la respuesta técnica a Vapi y actualiza el estado de la llamada a SUCCESS.

# [03] GESTIÓN DE HORARIOS Y RESERVAS
## Consulta técnicos activos, genera bloques de tiempo disponibles y verifica colisiones en Google Calendar antes de confirmar e insertar la nueva cita.

# [04] CAPA DE TOLERANCIA A FALLOS Y AUDITORÍA
## Captura cualquier error de API o colisión de negocio, entrega respuestas controladas a Vapi para mantener la llamada viva y registra las métricas/errores finales en Supabase.
